name: Ecrevisse (Crawfish) Strudel with Two Sauces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat sesame oil in a large heavy saucepan.
2. Add red, yellow, and green bell peppers and sauté until tender.
3. Add green onions, bok choy, bamboo shoots, shiitake mushrooms, and carrots; continue to sauté.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients (crawfish tails, hoisin sauce, soy sauce, ginger, garlic, cayenne pepper, black pepper, pink peppercorns, and salt) and cook until the crawfish are tender.
5. Place the mixture in a colander to drain excess liquid and cool completely.
6. Melt butter and brush between sheets of filo dough (7 total sheets).
7. Arrange the cooled crawfish mixture at the bottom end of the brushed filo dough.
8. Roll up tightly, sealing with additional melted butter.
9. Place the strudel in a 350°F oven and bake until the filo dough is golden brown.
10. Serve the strudel on plates with Plum Ginger Sauce and Leek Mustard Sauce on the side.
Note: Ensure all steps are completed before placing the strudel in the oven to maintain proper texture.
